name: Oriental Honeyed Pork
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine flour and spices. Coat pork.
2. In a large frying pan, sauté pork in oil until no longer pink (4-5 minutes).
3. Drain pineapple, saving juice. Add pineapple, green pepper, mushrooms, and tomatoes to the pork.
4. Stir in chicken broth, honey, and soy sauce. Mix cornstarch with 1/4 cup pineapple juice; add, stirring constantly.
5. Serve with rice. Serves 4-6.
Origin: Homestyles, Canadian Classics
Shared by: Sharon Stevens
